title: Dexam 17840994 Faringdon Set of 4 Stainless Steel Measuring Cups, 60, 80, 125, 250ml, Silver
features: Measure the required amount of Spaghetti effortlessly and quickly
Simply place the Spaghetti in the relevant hole to measure the perfect portion
description: From the manufacturer Faringdon Set of 4 Stainless Steel Measuring Cups, 60, 80, 125, 250ml There's something inherently stylish about measuring cups that come in the shape of beautiful, miniature saucepans. A kitchen essential. Four stainless steel measuring cups on a metal ring, marked with volumes in cups and the metric equivalent in millilitres: 1/4 cup (60ml), 1/3 cup (80ml), 1/2 cup (125ml) and 1 cup (250ml). The 1 cup measure is also marked with 1/4, 1/2 and 3/4 cup. Part of the Dexam Bakeware range A much enjoyed pastime, for those who enjoy rolling up their sleeves and getting their hands covered in dough, be prepared with all the correct Bakeware available at Dexam. From quality rolling pins to durable cake tins and cookie cutters, Dexam has the required tools essential for all baking adventures. You can be confident that all our Bakeware is handpicked and chosen for its quality, versatility and affordability, fitting effortlessly into any kitchen. Also part of the Dexam Bakeware range Dexam 17848857 Plastic Double Sided Plain/Crinkle Round Cookie Cutters, Set of 6 Our set of 6 Cookie Cutters are the ideal additional to your baking utensils, with diameters from 5 - 10cms each cutter is designed with a plain edge and also a crinkle cut effect edge to give you options when using. With their bright colours and no sharp edges these are perfect for children to use s they start their baking journey. Packaged in a handy storage. Dessert Tin Heavy Duty 12 Cup This Professional quality Pan enables you to make 12 individual desserts such as baked cheesecakes, chocolate puddings, scones, large muffins, or mini Victoria sponge cakes. You could also make individual cheese soufflés. Each cup measures 7.5cm diameter x 4.5cm deep (3” x 1¾”), and they have loose bases, which make it easy to release your desserts or soufflés. Dexam 17841132 17 x 6.5 cm 18 cm Round Cake Liners Siliconised Paper, Pack of 50, Aluminium, White, 18cm It's so easy to give your bakery a professional finish with these loaf tin liners. Perfect for sponges and fruit cakes for parties, and batches of cakes or your freezer. Made from siliconised, easy release baking paper, with elegant fluted edges, they fit most 2lb loaf tins. They're oven safe to 230C (445F) and microwave safe. About Dexam Two brothers started the company 1957, travelling round the world discovering great products for improving the home, and importing them into the UK. They had a one room office, a high desk, a typewriter and a couple of dogs. Their wives did most of the packing, and their children came in to help - or hinder - at weekends. Their first delivery went to a shop in Ilkley, Yorkshire, which is still a customer to this day. And one of the children helping out back then is still here today. Throughout the years, our principles have remained the same: innovation , reliability , friendliness. Along with immersing ourselves in the surrounding community, here at Dexam, we are also passionate about reducing our impact on the environment. Working hard and finding ways to be sustainable, we are enthusiastic about reducing our carbon footprint while supplying our customers with essential cookware that they need most.
